Document:
# Sylphs
[color=#ffa500]Warning! This species is not recommended for new players due to low health and explosive death![/color]
Sylphs have a base hp of 75
Sylphs slightly heal from being shocked. Sylphs are effectively living batteries as such they deal shock damage with there fist Sylphs are living batteries, they can passively charge batterys in there invertory they can charge apcs at the cost of some hunger and genetic damage, There hearts can be removed and function as infinite batteries but if emped they loose all function. If by any cause a Voltan dies they will explode into lighting and an emp.
